problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: If CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
